title: BEM-865 queue path markers2
objective:
Run script:
"""
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem865_queue_path_markers')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
files = [Path('.github/workflows/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.yml'), Path('.github/workflows/claude_internal_auditor_dispatcher.yml'), Path('.github/workflows/claude_mailbox_autoprocess.yml'), Path('.github/workflows/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog.yml')]
tokens = ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue', 'governance/workflow_dispatch/queue', 'workflow_dispatch_queue', 'workflow_dispatch_' + 'requests', 'dispatch_queue', 'workflow_dispatch_results', 'workflow_dispatch_processed']
seen = []
for f in files:
    text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if f.exists() else ''
    for token in tokens:
        if token in text and token not in seen:
            seen.append(token)
for i, token in enumerate(seen):
    safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in token)
    marker = outdir / (str(i).zfill(2) + '_' + safe + '.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-865 queue path marker\nToken: ' + token + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(marker))
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_QUEUE_PATH_MARKERS_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-865 queue path markers\nCount: ' + str(len(seen)) + '\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + s for s in seen) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('queue path markers created: ' + str(len(seen)))
"""
No issue comments.
